[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Ohran Keldor''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] engineer at the [[Maw Installation]], born in [[50 BBY/Legends|50 BBY]].

==Biography==
Keldor was one of the instructors at [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin's]] orbital training academy above [[Omwat/Legends|Omwat]], and he later employed a hundred [[Mrlssi]]. [[Nasdra Magrody]] instructed him in [[Artificial intelligence/Legends|AI]] theory.

He was present when the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destroyed]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. He later worked with [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda Ismaren]] and her son [[Irek Ismaren]] in order to bring the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]'' to [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] in order to use it against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], he died when he fell off of a loader on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] chasing after [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].
